columns.name: cew_page_id
columns.comment: Page ID of the worklist's backing wiki page (local to cew_wiki); used to track the page across moves/deletions.

columns.name: cew_page_prefixedtext
columns.comment: Full prefixed text for cross-wiki display, see T226667.

columns.name: cew_user_id
columns.comment: Central user ID of the worklist owner.

columns.name: cew_username
columns.comment: Username for display and sorting; nullable when only the central ID is known.

columns.name: cew_timestamp
columns.comment: Timestamp for the worklist row (UTC, TS_MW).

columns.name: cew_content_rev
columns.comment: ID of the last revision used to synchronize the worklist content to the secondary store; null until the first synchronization.

indexes.name: ce_worklists_wiki_page_id
indexes.comment: Each worklist's backing page is unique per wiki; also used for lookups when the page changes.
